revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-4-205

A junction of dissimilar conductors arranged in a circuit so that a voltage is developed by the thermoelectric effect when a temperature difference exists between the junction and other parts of the circuit.

{{IALAFooter}}

{{languages|Thermocouple}}
